Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration


Off Calendar Oct-15-2025 Continued To Dec-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rowena Navia for administrator Raquel Grant (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Ms. Navia reported that additional information was still needed from a related estate pending in Arizona, for which her client also serves as administrator. She acknowledged that several issues raised by the examiner remained outstanding but anticipated filing a final account once the necessary documents were obtained. Ms. Navia requested 45-to-60-day continuance.

The Court continued the matter to December 10, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
